Package com.dtwthalion.ttio.hdf5

Class Hdf5File

java.lang.Object
com.dtwthalion.ttio.hdf5.Hdf5File
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public class Hdf5File extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Thin wrapper around an HDF5 file handle. Implements AutoCloseable for try-with-resources support.

Thread-safety model (mirrors ObjC M23): each Hdf5File owns a ReentrantReadWriteLock that serialises access from derived Hdf5Group and Hdf5Dataset instances. Readers do not block readers; writers are exclusive. When the native HDF5 library is not thread-safe, readers are promoted to the write (exclusive) lock.

Since:
0.5

    • isThreadSafe

      public boolean isThreadSafe()
      Returns true iff the linked libhdf5 is thread-safe AND the wrapper lock initialised. When false, concurrent use is undefined.
